title: Package, CLI, API, Configuration, Async Lifecycle, and Deployment · Contract Workshop
summary: A public-interest product team incrementally builds installable operable Python agent service from original fixed provider, interaction, tool, approval, evaluation, and failure fixtures while retaining prior Python, HTTP, prompt, loop, security, accessibility, testing, and recovery requirements. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of installable operable Python agent service while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, change…
objectives: Separate domain policy, provider adapter, orchestration, tools, persistence, interfaces, and composition root in an import-safe typed package.
Expose consistent request, event, terminal, error, cancellation, idempotency, and version behavior through accessible CLI and authenticated API surfaces.
Validate environment-specific non-secret configuration, inject secret references separately, reject unsafe defaults, and publish a redacted effective config.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Commit to the mission model · Workshop Package Boundaries
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop agent engineering team handles case 8723 during a controlled support-operations rehearsal. Build deterministic Python evidence to package the agent core, CLI and API with typed configuration, secret injection, async lifecycle, health, readiness, identity, and clean shutdown; last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure; then introduce a sensitive action, poisoned memory, leaking log, or computer-use request and deny or pause it. Browser code uses pure bounded state machines and original fixed fixtures only. Real provider APIs, Gemini models, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic native validation, HTTP, files, credentials, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, privacy review, and production effects require explicit controlled transfer gates. Build deterministic Python evidence to package the agent core, CLI and API with typed configuration, secret injection, async lifecycle, health, readiness, identity, and clean shutdown; sensitive actions require a trustworthy user approval bound to exact arguments; then introduce a sensitive action, poisoned memory, leaking log, or computer-use request and deny or pause it. Browser code uses pure bounded state machines and original fixed fixtures only. Real provider APIs, Gemini models, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic native validation, HTTP, files, credentials, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, privacy review, and production effects require explicit controlled transfer gates. steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Workshop Deployment Identity
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: agentpy-deployment-identity-1cpwux" that uses case 1741 to package the agent core, CLI and API with typed configuration, secret injection, async lifecycle, health, readiness, identity, and clean shutdown. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not contact provider APIs, invoke Gemini models, import or claim native google-genai, google-adk, or Pydantic behavior, open sockets, read or write host files, use credentials, execute generated code, launch browsers, reach databases or telemetry backends, or claim live privacy, load, safety, cost, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, google-genai 2.11.0, google-adk 2.4.0, Pydantic 2.13.4, fixed provider fixtures, fake transports, controlled local services, disposable cloud projects, representative eval sets, accessibility, privacy and security review, load, canary, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

Evidence target: Safe AI agents and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Workshop Deployment Identity.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Deployment Identity into observable performance evidence. For Safe AI agents and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Workshop Deployment Identity, keep Deployment Identity connected to executable Python model, interaction, tool, policy, state, approval, evaluation, security, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-deployment-identity-1cpwux
# Competency: agentpy-deployment-identity.
# Case 1741: a multilingual case-routing evaluation.
# Operating constraint: telemetry and memory must remain tenant-isolated, minimized, redacted, and attributable.
# Changed case: change one eval case, rubric, model version, token price, rate limit, or latency distribution and rerun release gates.
def evidence_agentpy_deployment_identity_1cpwux(target_environments: int = 3, clean_installs: int = 3, lifecycle_smokes: int = 12, healthy_shutdowns: int = 12, leaked_credentials: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1cpwux = "1cpwux-xuwpc1-1741"
    assert evidence_variant_1cpwux
    evidence_axes_1cpwux = (
        "authority1cpwux",
        "interaction1741",
        "toolxuwpc1",
        "state1cpwux1741",
        "evaluation17411cpwux",
        "recoveryxuwpc11741",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1cpwux)) == 6
    if target_environments < 1 or clean_installs < 0:
        return False, clean_installs, "package-matrix"
    if clean_installs != target_environments:
        return False, clean_installs, "clean-install-gap"
    if lifecycle_smokes < 3 or healthy_shutdowns != lifecycle_smokes:
        return False, healthy_shutdowns, "lifecycle-gap"
    if leaked_credentials > 0:
        return False, leaked_credentials, "deployment-secret-leak"
    assert clean_installs == target_environments and healthy_shutdowns == lifecycle_smokes
    return True, healthy_shutdowns, "operable-agent-service"
